name: Torus POP
description: The Torus POP creates rows and columns of points in a closed tube shape. The points can be connected with a variety of primitives using the Connectivity menu. The ring and the cross-section of the torus each have a radius parameter. The Connectivity menu lets you output triangles, alternating triangles, quads, lines, line strips, point primitives or no primitives (None, only points). You specify number of rows and columns. Columns refers to the divisions around the ring, Rows to the divisions around the cross-section circle. In the Connectivity menu you can create lines and line strips along Rows, Columns or both merged together. The torus is symmetric around an axis, Y by default, but the torus can be post-rotated and post-translated using the Rotate and Translate parameters. Anchor will line up the left, center or right side of the torus to X=0, Y=0 or Z=0. The Details page lets you make a partial torus by specifying an arc of the ring with any starting/ending angle. The End Caps toggle will add triangles or quads to fill the end caps and make the torus a closed volume, which still preserves the [[Dimension]] since no points are added or removed, only primitives are added. [[Dimension]]: When the torus is passed to other POPs it cannot be known for certain how many rows and columns were specified. However the Torus POP (and other generator POPs) output its Dimensions as metadata to all POPs connected to it, indicating its organizations of points in the points list. A torus has dimensions numCols numRows, which can be used by built-in attributes like _Dim[] or by GLSL code. You can output point or vertex normals (creating the N attribute), and you can output point or vertex texture coordinates (Tex attribute). The Torus POP takes an input which will cause the starting tube to have the same bounding box as the bounding box of the input. Then turning on Modify Bounds lets you further transform the torus. See also [[Tube POP]], [[Sphere POP]], [[Grid POP]], [[Field POP]], [[Point Generator POP]], [[Revolve POP]], [[Dimension]]

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: Line Type
parameters.label: Line Type
parameters.description: Specifies whether lines should be made of line strip primitives or lines primitives.

parameters.name: Orientation
parameters.label: Orientation
parameters.description: Sets the axis for the torus.

parameters.name: Modify Bounds
parameters.label: Modify Bounds
parameters.description: Available only when an input is connected to the POP to set bounds for the POP. When Modify Bounds is On the parameters below will further modify the shape of the POP.

parameters.name: Radius
parameters.label: Radius
parameters.description: Radii of ring and radius of swept circle.

parameters.name: Anchor U
parameters.label: Anchor U
parameters.description: Puts the left side, the middle or the right side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: Anchor V
parameters.label: Anchor V
parameters.description: Puts the bottom side, the middle or the top side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: Anchor W
parameters.label: Anchor W
parameters.description: Puts the back side, the middle or the front side at the origin 0.

parameters.name: Translate
parameters.label: Translate
parameters.description: Translate the points in the three axes.

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotate the points around the corresponding X, Y and Z axes. Angles are given in degrees.

parameters.name: Uniform Scale
parameters.label: Uniform Scale
parameters.description: Specifies a uniform scale factor in all axes.

parameters.name: Normal
parameters.label: Normal
parameters.description: Choose whether to create a normal attribute and the attribute class of the normal attribute.

parameters.name: Texture Coordinates
parameters.label: Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the texture coordinates should be created.

parameters.name: U Closed
parameters.label: U Closed
parameters.description: Enable closed geometry in U direction.

parameters.name: V Closed
parameters.label: V Closed
parameters.description: Enable closed geometry in V direction.

parameters.name: Angle U
parameters.label: Angle U
parameters.description: The angle the torus covers along U.

parameters.name: Angle V
parameters.label: Angle V
parameters.description: The angle the torus covers along V.

_provenance.fact: parameters and description scraped from the live Torus_POP wiki page ({{Parameter}}/{{ParameterItem}} templates)
